How Boldness Score Works
Each award has a consensus Vegas favorite. Picking the favorite scores 0 boldness points. Picking anyone else scores 10+ boldness points depending on how far outside consensus they are. A score of 0-20 = Safe Player. 21-40 = Contrarian. 41-60 = Bold. 61-80 = High Risk. 81-90 = All-In Degen.
NFL 2026 award candidates based on consensus preseason projections. Picks are for entertainment purposes only.
